findings.title: lodash 4.17.11 - CVE-2019-10744
findings.description: Versions of lodash before 4.17.12 are vulnerable to prototype pollution.

findings.title: Direct innerHTML assignment (possible XSS)
findings.recommendation: Use textContent or a sanitizer; avoid injecting unescaped HTML.

findings.title: child_process.exec() with shell
findings.recommendation: Prefer execFile/spawn with an argument array to avoid command injection.

findings.title: Hardcoded credential in assignment
findings.recommendation: Remove the secret from source, rotate it immediately, and load it from an environment variable or secret manager.
